---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do that's hard today?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to see. Please keep it aligned with the method (PLAYBOOK.md) and
the project's constraints: standard-library only, dry-run by default, reversible.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches, and why they fall short.
